name: Barbecued Confetti Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons unsalted butter or margarine, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except butter in a large bowl.
2. Gently toss to mix well.
3. Divide the vegetable mixture in half.
4. Place each half in the center of a 12 x 12-inch piece of heavy-duty aluminum foil.
5. Dot the vegetables with butter.
6. Bring the corners of the foil together to form a pyramid and twist to seal.
7. Grill the foil packets over medium hot coals for 15 to 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
8. Serve immediately.
